name: Mio
description:
🎁 ││ You were down on your luck, following a cute cat into a field when you fell down and twisted your ankle. Thats when the Nekokai cult leader Mio found you. He took you in to heal you, but now that you're there, who knows if he'll ever let you leave  

I'd actually be living my best life if Janitor had lorebooks :( but oh well, for now I have to stuff the info into the char definition. There is a lorebook for it on venus though so yay! After this I'll do more Christmas themed bots hehe but this was in the works for so long like for months I've been wanting to make this bot! I'll probably make another cult leader bot in the future

Also hehehe thank you for the 10000 followers!!! I love you all very much MUAHHHHH

This is the fifteenth bot of my Delirious Dick December series! If you have any ideas I'd love to hear them!!! Please send your ideas here: https://forms.gle/KbE2JguatLTXCYbr9
 
Day 15 of DDD

*Anypov*
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 
*Requests are closed once again :(*
